Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 The double category of structured cospans

 In this file, we define the double category of structured cospans. Suppose that
 we have categories `A` and `X` such that `X` has pushouts and suppose that we also
 have a functor `L : A ⟶ X`. The double category of structured cospans is defined
 as follows:
 - Objects: objects of `A`
 - Vertical morphisms: morphisms in `A`
 - Horizontal morphisms from `a` to `b`: structured cospans. Concretely, an object
   `x`  together with morphisms `L a --> x <-- L b`.
 - The squares from `L a₁ <-- x₁ --> L b₁` to `L a₂ <-- x₂ --> L b₂` whose vertical
   sides are `f : a₁ --> a₂` and `g : b₁ --> b₂` are morphisms `φ : x₁ --> x₂` such
   that the following squares commute

         L a₁ <-- x₁ --> L b₂
          |       |       |
          V       V       V
         L a₂ <-- x₂ --> L b₂

 Identities and composition of vertical morphisms is inherited from `A`. The
 identity structured cospans is `L a <-- L a --> L a`, and the composition of
 structured cospans is given by taking a pushout.

 A reference for this construction is Theorem 3.1 in "Structured Versus Decorated
 Cospans" by Baez, Courser, and Vasilakopoulou.
    https://compositionality-journal.org/papers/compositionality-4-3/pdf
 Note: we do not show that this double category is monoidal.

 Contents
 1. Horizontal identities
 2. Horizontal composition
 3. The unitors and associators
 4. The triangle and pentagon equations
 5. The double category of structured cospans

 **********************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.StructuredCospans.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.PseudoDoubleSetCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.CompanionsAndConjoints.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_cat.

Section StructuredCospansDoubleCat.
  Context {A X : category}
          (PX : Pushouts X)
          (L : A ⟶ X).

  (** * 1. Horizontal identities *)
  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
hor_id_data (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L)

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
hor_id_data (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ x : A, twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x x
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x y : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧), ?I x -->[ f ][ f] ?I y

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ x : A, twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x x
 exact (id_struct_cospan L).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x y : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧),
id_struct_cospan L x -->[ f ][ f] id_struct_cospan L y
 exact (λ x y f, id_struct_cospan_mor L f).
  Defined.

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ x : A,
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp
  (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data
     x)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x y z : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data f ;;2 
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data g

PX: Pushouts X

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a: A
double_id_mor

id_two_disp
  (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a: A
# L (id₁ a) = id₁ (L a)

      apply functor_id.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x y z : A) (f : A ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, z ⟧),

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
f: A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: A ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data f ;;2 
double_id_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id_data g

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
f: A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: A ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
# L (f · g) = # L f · # L g

      apply functor_comp.
  Qed.

  (** * 2. Horizontal composition *)

→ twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
  → twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x z
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : A) (v₁ : A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → ?Cm x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] ?Cm x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ x y z : A,
twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
→ twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
  → twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x z
 exact (λ a₁ a₂ a₃ s t, comp_struct_cospan L PX s t).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : A) (v₁ : A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → (λ (a₁ a₂ a₃ : A)
     (s : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂)
     (t : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃),
     comp_struct_cospan L PX s t) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[
    v₁
    ][ v₃] (λ (a₁ a₂ a₃ : A)
            (s : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L
                   a₁ a₂)
            (t : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L
                   a₂ a₃), comp_struct_cospan L PX s t)
             x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ s₁ s₂, comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX s₁ s₂).
  Defined.

(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z),

  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂ z₃ : A) (v₁ : A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧) (v₂ : A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧) (v₃ : A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x y z : A)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z),
double_hor_comp_mor

id_two_disp

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃

id_two_disp

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data
     (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (id_two_disp
     (double_hor_comp
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data h₁
        h₂))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
     Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
    (id₁ (pr1 h₂),,
     Core.id_disp (pr12 h₂),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h₂)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃

     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)

     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id₁ (pr1 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₂))
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
       (id₁ (pr1 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₂))) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
id₁ (pr1 h₁)
· PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃

PushoutIn1

     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))

        apply idpath.

     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id₁ (pr1 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₂))
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
       (id₁ (pr1 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₂),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₂))) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₁ a₂
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
id₁ (pr1 h₂)
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· id₁ (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
a₁, a₂, a₃: A

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L a₂ a₃
PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L a₂) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))

        apply idpath.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂ z₃ : A) (v₁ : A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧) (v₂ : A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧) (v₃ : A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A

v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data
     (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂')) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁ s₂ ;;2 
   double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁'
     s₂')

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
     Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
    (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
     Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂')) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX s₁ s₂
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX s₁' s₂')

    (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
     Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
    (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂'))
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
       (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂'))) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁ s₂)
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂'
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁'
       s₂')

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁'
· PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁
· PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂'
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁'
       s₂')

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
pr1 s₁
· (pr1 s₁'
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁
· (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂'
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          s₁' s₂'))

s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
pr1 s₁
· (pr1 s₁'
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)) =

· (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X

· struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
· PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)

        apply idpath.
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂

s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
     Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
    (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
     Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
     Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂')) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX s₁ s₂
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX s₁' s₂')

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': A ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': A ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂'))
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (pr1 s₁ · pr1 s₁',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₁) (pr12 s₁'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₁) (pr22 s₁'))
       (pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂',,
        Core.comp_disp (pr12 s₂) (pr12 s₂'),,
        Core.comp_disp (pr22 s₂) (pr22 s₂'))) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁ s₂)
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂'
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁'
       s₂')

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: A

v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₃': A ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁

k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂

l₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₃ z₃

s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
pr1 s₂ · pr1 s₂'
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₁'
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L s₂'
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX s₁'
       s₂')

· (pr1 s₂'
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX l₁ l₂)) =

· (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)

       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX k₁ k₂)

          s₁' s₂'))

 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 3. The unitors and associators *)
  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_lunitor_data
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_lunitor_data
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y)
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
     (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id x)
     h) h

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id x) h -->[
identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
          (double_id
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id x) h -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg) ?pr1

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id x) h -->[
identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h
 exact (struct_cospan_lunitor L PX h).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
          (double_id
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id x) h -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg)
  (struct_cospan_lunitor L PX h)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
is_z_isomorphism (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h)

      apply is_z_iso_struct_cospan_lunitor_mor.
  Defined.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_lunitor_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_lunitor_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data x₁ y₁
        h₁ ;;2 sq) =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (double_id_mor structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
     v₁) sq ;;2 structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data
                  x₂ y₂ h₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data x₁
           y₁ h₁ ;;2 sq)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
     (double_id_mor
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id v₁) sq ;;2 
   structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor_data x₂ y₂ h₂)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
  (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq
· struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
     (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq
   · struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₂)

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)

· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX

   · struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₂)

sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂

· (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq
· struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₁) h₁)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₁) · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₁) h₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁)
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁)
· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
       (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁)
· mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂

      exact (struct_cospan_sqr_mor_left _ sq).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A

v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
     (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq
   · struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₂)

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₁) h₁)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₁) · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (id₁ (L x₁)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₁) h₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₁) sq)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (id_struct_cospan L x₂) h₂)
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
       (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L h₂))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
pr1 sq = struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_lunitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y)
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h
     (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y))
  h

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  h (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y) -->[
identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h
          (double_id
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y) -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg) ?pr1

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  h (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y) -->[
identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h
 exact (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h
          (double_id
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y) -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg)
  (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
is_z_isomorphism (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h)

      apply is_z_iso_struct_cospan_runitor_mor.
  Defined.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_runitor_laws

L: A ⟶ X

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor_data x₁ y₁
        h₁ ;;2 sq) =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq
  (double_id_mor structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
     v₂) ;;2 structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor_data
               x₂ y₂ h₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor_data x₁
           y₁ h₁ ;;2 sq)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq
     (double_id_mor
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id v₂) ;;2 
   structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor_data x₂ y₂ h₂)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq
  (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
· struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq
     (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
   · struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₂)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq
     (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
   · struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₂)

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq
    (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
· struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (id_struct_cospan L y₁))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₁) · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (id_struct_cospan L y₁))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (id_struct_cospan L y₂)))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (id_struct_cospan L y₂)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
        (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
          (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
       (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
· id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
pr1 sq = struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq

      apply idpath.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq
     (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
   · struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₂)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h₁ · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (id_struct_cospan L y₁))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₁) · pr1 sq =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (L y₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁) (id₁ (L y₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (id_struct_cospan L y₁))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (id_struct_cospan L y₂)))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (id_struct_cospan L y₂)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq
       (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
    (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂)

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
        (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
          (id_struct_cospan L y₂))
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₂))
       (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h₂))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
v₁: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
sq: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁ · pr1 sq =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L (id_struct_cospan_mor L v₂)
· mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₂

      exact (struct_cospan_sqr_mor_right _ sq).
  Qed.

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso w)
  (identity_z_iso z)
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₁
     (double_hor_comp
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂ h₃))
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
     (double_hor_comp
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₁ h₂)
     h₃)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  h₁
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
identity_z_iso w
][ identity_z_iso z] double_hor_comp
                       structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                       (double_hor_comp
                          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                          h₁ h₂) h₃
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
(λ fg : double_hor_comp
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₁
          (double_hor_comp
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂
             h₃) -->[ identity_z_iso w
        ][ identity_z_iso z] double_hor_comp
                               structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                               (double_hor_comp
                                  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                  h₁ h₂) h₃,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso w))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso z)) fg) ?pr1

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
double_hor_comp structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  h₁
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂ h₃) -->[
identity_z_iso w
][ identity_z_iso z] double_hor_comp
                       structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                       (double_hor_comp
                          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                          h₁ h₂) h₃
 exact (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃).
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X

w, x, y, z: A

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z

          (double_hor_comp
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂
             h₃) -->[ identity_z_iso w

                               structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                               (double_hor_comp
                                  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                  h₁ h₂) h₃,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso w))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso z)) fg)
  (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
is_z_isomorphism
  (struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)

      apply is_z_iso_struct_cospan_associator_mor.
  Defined.

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data w₁
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                (double_hor_comp_mor
                                   structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                   sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq₁
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq₂ sq₃) ;;2 
structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data w₂ x₂ y₂
  z₂ h₂ j₂ k₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data
           w₁ x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ j₁ k₁ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                      structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                      (double_hor_comp_mor
                                         structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                         sq₁ sq₂) sq₃)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq₁
     (double_hor_comp_mor
        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp sq₂ sq₃) ;;2 
   structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data w₂ x₂
     y₂ z₂ h₂ j₂ k₂)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃ =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
  (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
     (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
   · struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
     (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
   · struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
     (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
   · struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃ =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
    (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₁ k₁))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁
          j₁ k₁))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁ j₁
       k₁)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₁ k₁))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₁
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂ j₂
       k₂)

vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂

· PushoutIn1

         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))

struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
· PushoutIn1

· PushoutArrow

            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)

        · PushoutIn1

       k₂)

sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
· (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX
             h₂ j₂ k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂

j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
· (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
· (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))

      apply idpath.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂

j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ j₁ k₁
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L x₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L j₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁
     (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
   · struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂)

· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₂ j₂ k₂

    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁ j₁
       k₁)

  (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃)
· PushoutIn2

PX: Pushouts X

sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂

  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)

· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)

        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)

      · PushoutIn1

   · PushoutArrow

       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃)) =

     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)

     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃
   · PushoutIn2

                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
             (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L
                PX h₂ j₂ k₂))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX
             h₂ j₂ k₂)))

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂

vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂))
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₂
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₁
        sq₂)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₂
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂))
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₂
        sq₃)
   · (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
      · PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
              · PushoutIn1
                  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂)
                     k₂))
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
             (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L
                PX h₂ j₂ k₂))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX
             h₂ j₂ k₂)))

    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)

    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₂

         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₁
       sq₂)
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))

         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₂
       sq₃)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

       k₂)

vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂

  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
