       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX
             h₂ j₂ k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁ j₁
       k₁)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₂ sq₃
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂ j₂
       k₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁ j₁
       k₁)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ j₁) k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ j₁)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₁
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂))
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₂
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          sq₁ sq₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX sq₁ sq₂) sq₃) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y₁) (ob_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k₁)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L j₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k₁))
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₁ k₁)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₂
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX sq₂
       sq₃)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂ j₂
       k₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₂
          j₂ k₂))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₂ j₂
       k₂)

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
   · (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
      · PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX j₂ k₂))
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX j₂ k₂)
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ j₂)
              · PushoutIn1
                  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂)
                     k₂))
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂))
             (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L
                PX h₂ j₂ k₂))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX
             h₂ j₂ k₂)))

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y₂ z₂
vw: A ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: A ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: A ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: A ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
sq₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
sq₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
sq₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L sq₃
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ j₂) k₂)

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_associator
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_associator
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_associator_data
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_associator_laws ?a

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_associator_data
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_associator_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_data
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_associator_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 4. The triangle and pentagon equations *)
  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
triangle_law structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
triangle_law structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
double_associator
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h
  (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y) k ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (double_runitor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor h)
  (id_two_disp k) =
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor
       structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
       (id_two_disp h)
       (double_lunitor
          structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor k)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_associator
     structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h
     (double_id structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id y)
     k ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
             structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
             (double_runitor
                structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor
                h) (id_two_disp k)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor
          structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
          (id_two_disp h)
          (double_lunitor
             structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor k))

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h
  (id_struct_cospan L y) k
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h)
    (id₁ (pr1 k),,
     Core.id_disp (pr12 k),, Core.id_disp (pr22 k)) =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
  (id₁ (pr1 h),,
   Core.id_disp (pr12 h),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h))
  (struct_cospan_lunitor L PX k)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A

x, y, z: A

             (id_struct_cospan L y) k)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX
           (id_struct_cospan L y) k))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
           (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)

           (id_struct_cospan L y))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
                (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
     (PushoutArrow
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
           (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
              (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
              (id_struct_cospan L y))
         · PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
                   (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
              (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
                 (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
        (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h
           (id_struct_cospan L y) k))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h
        (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

             (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L PX h
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
       (id₁ (pr1 k)
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h)
          (id₁ (pr1 k),,
           Core.id_disp (pr12 k),,
           Core.id_disp (pr22 k)))) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h)
     (id₁ (L y)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (id_struct_cospan L y) k)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX (id_struct_cospan L y)
          k)) (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)
    (id₁ (pr1 h)
     · PushoutIn1

    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L PX k

· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y

· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k) =

· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y) (L y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (id₁ (L y)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
           (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
           (id_struct_cospan L y))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
                (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
              (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h
        (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
             (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
             (id_struct_cospan L y))
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L h)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h))
          (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h)
          (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
       (id₁ (pr1 k)
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h)
          (id₁ (pr1 k),,
           Core.id_disp (pr12 k),,
           Core.id_disp (pr22 k)))) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y) (L y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (id₁ (L y)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L k))
     (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L k)
   · PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y, z: A
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y) (L y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (id₁ (L y)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
          (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
          (id_struct_cospan L y))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
               (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
             (id_struct_cospan L y)) k))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h
       (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h
          (id_struct_cospan L y)) k)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h
          (id_struct_cospan L y))
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L h)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L h))
       (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L h)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
    (id₁ (pr1 k)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (struct_cospan_runitor L PX h)
       (id₁ (pr1 k),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 k),, Core.id_disp (pr22 k))) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX (L y) (L y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
     (id₁ (L y)) (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (id_struct_cospan L y) k)
    (ob_of_struct_cospan L k)
    (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L k)
    (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L k))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L k)
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h k)

x, y, z: A

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X

pentagon_law structured_cospans_double_cat_associator

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
pentagon_law structured_cospans_double_cat_associator

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
trb₂ (double_associator
        structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₁ h₂
        (double_hor_comp
           structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₃
           h₄) ;;2 double_associator
                     structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                     (double_hor_comp
                        structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                        h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄) =
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (id_two_disp h₁)
  (double_associator
     structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₂ h₃ h₄) ;;2 
double_associator
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₁
  (double_hor_comp
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp h₂ h₃) h₄ ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
  (double_associator
     structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₁ h₂ h₃)
  (id_two_disp h₄)

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (trb₂ (double_associator
           structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₁
           h₂
           (double_hor_comp
              structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
              h₃ h₄) ;;2 double_associator
                           structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                           (double_hor_comp
                              structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                              h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
     (id_two_disp h₁)
     (double_associator
        structured_cospans_double_cat_associator h₂ h₃
        h₄) ;;2 double_associator
                  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                  h₁
                  (double_hor_comp
                     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                     h₂ h₃) h₄ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                     structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                     (double_associator
                                        structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                                        h₁ h₂ h₃)
                                     (id_two_disp h₄))

    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁ h₂
  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)
· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX
    (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄ =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
  (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
   Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
  (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₂ h₃ h₄)
· struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁
    (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
    (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
    (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
     Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h₄))

PushoutIn1
  (PX (L w) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂

        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))

      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L PX
     (id₁ (pr1 h₁),,
      Core.id_disp (pr12 h₁),, Core.id_disp (pr22 h₁))
     (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₂ h₃ h₄)
   · struct_cospan_associator_mor L PX h₁

        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L w) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))
     (PushoutArrow
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
         · PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
              (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
              (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))
        (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁
           h₂ (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁
        h₂ (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₃ h₄)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                     h₃) h₄))
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
                h₄))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃ h₄)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX (L w) (ob_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L h₁)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L h₂
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄))))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₃ h₄)))

                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
                (PushoutIn1
                   (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
                      h₂)
                 · PushoutIn1
                     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                        h₃))
                (PushoutArrow
                   (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂
                      h₃)
                   (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                      (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                      h₃)
                   (PushoutIn2
                      (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                         h₁ h₂)
                    · PushoutIn1
                        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L
                           PX
                           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                              h₂) h₃))
                   (PushoutIn2
                      (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                         (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                            h₂) h₃))
                   (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof
                      L PX h₁ h₂ h₃))
                (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0
                   L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
              · PushoutIn1
                  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                        h₃) h₄))
             (id₁ (pr1 h₄)
              · PushoutIn2
                  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                        h₃) h₄))
             (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L
                PX
                (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂
                   h₃)
                (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
                 Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,
                 Core.id_disp (pr22 h₄)))))) = ?b

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z

· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
   · (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁

                    (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
                    h₄))

                 h₄))

         · PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
                h₄)

                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

                      h₃)

                      (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)

                         h₁ h₂)
                    · PushoutIn1
                        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L

                              h₂) h₃))

                            h₂) h₃))

              · PushoutIn1

                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)

                        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)

                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ h₃)
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)

              · PushoutIn1

                     h₃))

                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
             (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L

        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))
       (id₁ (pr1 h₄)
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
          (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
           Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,

                     h₃))

        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))

            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX

               h₄))

             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄))
    (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ h₃)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX
             h₁ h₂ h₃))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁
          h₂ h₃)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄))
    (id₁ (pr1 h₄)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
       (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₄))) = ?t2

            
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
  (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁
     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
       (comp_struct_cospan L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ h₃)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX
             h₁ h₂ h₃))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX h₁
          h₂ h₃)
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄))
    (id₁ (pr1 h₄)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
            (comp_struct_cospan L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
       (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
       (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
        Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,
        Core.id_disp (pr22 h₄))) = ?t2

            apply idpath.
          
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
v, w, x, y, z: A
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L y z
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
           (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
              (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L PX h₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃) h₄)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃)) h₄)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
          (comp_struct_cospan L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₂ h₃))
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
             (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₂ h₃)
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX h₁ h₂)
              · PushoutIn1
                  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                     (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂)
                     h₃))
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
                   (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃))
             (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L
                PX h₁ h₂ h₃))
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof0 L PX
             h₁ h₂ h₃)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))
       (id₁ (pr1 h₄)
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
               (comp_struct_cospan L PX
                  (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃)
               h₄))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L PX
          (struct_cospan_associator L PX h₁ h₂ h₃)
          (id₁ (pr1 h₄),,
           Core.id_disp (pr12 h₄),,
           Core.id_disp (pr22 h₄)))) =
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L PX
     (comp_struct_cospan L PX
        (comp_struct_cospan L PX h₁ h₂) h₃) h₄)

  (** * 5. The double category of structured cospans *)

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
category
 exact A.

PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
twosided_disp_cat A A

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
hor_id (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L)
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
hor_comp (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L)
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_lunitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_runitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
double_cat_associator
  structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_associator.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
triangle_law structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_triangle.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
pentagon_law structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_pentagon.
  Defined.

  
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X

ver_weq_square structured_cospans_double_cat

ver_weq_square structured_cospans_double_cat

A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
(∑ fg : X ⟦ L x, L y ⟧,
 id₁ (L x) · fg = # L f · id₁ (L y)
 × id₁ (L x) · fg = # L g · id₁ (L y)) → f = g

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
fg: ∑ fg : X ⟦ L x, L y ⟧,
id₁ (L x) · fg = # L f · id₁ (L y)
× id₁ (L x) · fg = # L g · id₁ (L y)
f = g

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
h: X ⟦ L x, L y ⟧
p: id₁ (L x) · h = # L f · id₁ (L y)
q: id₁ (L x) · h = # L g · id₁ (L y)
f = g

f, g: x -->v y
isaprop (f = g)
 apply homset_property.
    
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
isaprop (square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y))
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
isProofIrrelevant
  (square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y))

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
φ₁ = φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 (identity_h x) -->[ f
          ][ g] pr1 (identity_h y),
   Core.mor_disp (pr2 (identity_h x))
     (pr2 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, x0))
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 (identity_h x) -->[ f
          ][ g] pr1 (identity_h y),
   Core.mor_disp (pr2 (identity_h x))
     (pr2 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, x0))

        
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
x0: pr1 (identity_h x) -->[ f
][ g] pr1 (identity_h y)
isaprop
  (Core.mor_disp (pr2 (identity_h x))
     (pr2 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, x0))

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply homset_property.
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁:= pr12 φ₁: Core.mor_disp (pr12 (identity_h x))
  (pr12 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, pr1 φ₁)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁:= pr12 φ₁: Core.mor_disp (pr12 (identity_h x))
  (pr12 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, pr1 φ₁)
p₂:= pr12 φ₂: Core.mor_disp (pr12 (identity_h x))
  (pr12 (identity_h y)) (f,, g,, pr1 φ₂)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁:= pr12 φ₁: id₁ (L x) · pr1 φ₁ = # L f · id₁ (L y)
p₂:= pr12 φ₂: id₁ (L x) · pr1 φ₂ = # L f · id₁ (L y)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁: pr1 φ₁ = # L f
p₂:= pr12 φ₂: id₁ (L x) · pr1 φ₂ = # L f · id₁ (L y)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁: pr1 φ₁ = # L f
p₂: pr1 φ₂ = # L f
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁: pr1 φ₁ = # L f
p₂: pr1 φ₂ = # L f
# L f = pr1 φ₂

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
H: fully_faithful L
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f, g: x -->v y
φ₁, φ₂: square f g (identity_h x) (identity_h y)
p₁: pr1 φ₁ = # L f
p₂: pr1 φ₂ = # L f
pr1 φ₂ = pr1 φ₂

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

f: x -->v y
(λ h : x -->h y, double_cat_are_companions h f)
  (struct_cospan_companion L f)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square f (identity_v y) (struct_cospan_companion L f)
  (identity_h y)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square (identity_v x) f (identity_h x)
  (struct_cospan_companion L f)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square
  (id_v_right (identity_v x ·v identity_v x) @
   id_v_right (identity_v x))
  (id_v_right (identity_v y ·v identity_v y) @
   id_v_right (identity_v y))
  (linvunitor_h (struct_cospan_companion L f)
   ⋆v ?ψ ⋆h ?φ
   ⋆v runitor_h (struct_cospan_companion L f)) =
id_v_square (struct_cospan_companion L f)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square (id_left f) (id_right f) (?ψ ⋆v ?φ) =
id_h_square f

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square f (identity_v y) (struct_cospan_companion L f)
  (identity_h y)
 exact (struct_cospan_companion_unit L f).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square (identity_v x) f (identity_h x)
  (struct_cospan_companion L f)
 exact (struct_cospan_companion_counit L f).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square
  (id_v_right (identity_v x ·v identity_v x) @
   id_v_right (identity_v x))
  (id_v_right (identity_v y ·v identity_v y) @
   id_v_right (identity_v y))
  (linvunitor_h (struct_cospan_companion L f)
   ⋆v struct_cospan_companion_counit L f
      ⋆h struct_cospan_companion_unit L f
   ⋆v runitor_h (struct_cospan_companion L f)) =
id_v_square (struct_cospan_companion L f)
 abstract
          (use struct_cospan_sqr_eq ;
           refine (transportf_disp_mor2_struct_cospan _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
           cbn ;
           unfold mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor, struct_cospan_runitor_mor ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2 ;
           rewrite id_left ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2 ;
           apply idpath).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square (id_left f) (id_right f)
  (struct_cospan_companion_counit L f
   ⋆v struct_cospan_companion_unit L f) =
id_h_square f
 abstract
          (use struct_cospan_sqr_eq ;
           refine (transportf_disp_mor2_struct_cospan _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
           cbn ;
           apply id_right).
  Defined.

L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
(λ h : y -->h x, double_cat_are_conjoints h f)
  (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
 
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square f (identity_v x) (identity_h x)
  (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square (identity_v y) f (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
  (identity_h y)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v y · identity_v y) @
   id_v_left (identity_v y))
  (id_v_left (identity_v x · identity_v x) @
   id_v_left (identity_v x))
  (rinvunitor_h (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
   ⋆v (?ε ⋆h ?η
       ⋆v lunitor_h (struct_cospan_conjoint L f))) =
id_v_square (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square (id_v_right f) (id_v_left f)
  (?η ⋆v ?ε) = id_h_square f

      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square f (identity_v x) (identity_h x)
  (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
 exact (struct_cospan_conjoint_unit L f).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
square (identity_v y) f (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
  (identity_h y)
 exact (struct_cospan_conjoint_counit L f).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v y · identity_v y) @
   id_v_left (identity_v y))
  (id_v_left (identity_v x · identity_v x) @
   id_v_left (identity_v x))
  (rinvunitor_h (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
   ⋆v (struct_cospan_conjoint_counit L f
       ⋆h struct_cospan_conjoint_unit L f
       ⋆v lunitor_h (struct_cospan_conjoint L f))) =
id_v_square (struct_cospan_conjoint L f)
 abstract
          (use struct_cospan_sqr_eq ;
           refine (transportf_disp_mor2_struct_cospan _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
           cbn ;
           unfold mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor, struct_cospan_lunitor_mor ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1 ;
           rewrite id_left ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1 ;
           apply idpath).
      
A, X: category
PX: Pushouts X
L: A ⟶ X
x, y: structured_cospans_double_cat
f: x -->v y
transportf_square (id_v_right f) (id_v_left f)
  (struct_cospan_conjoint_unit L f
   ⋆v struct_cospan_conjoint_counit L f) =
id_h_square f
 abstract
          (use struct_cospan_sqr_eq ;
           refine (transportf_disp_mor2_struct_cospan _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
           cbn ;
           apply id_right).
  Defined.
End StructuredCospansDoubleCat.
